# Real tensor-key set captured from the community single-file Krea 2 DiT
# `kreamania_variant5.safetensors` (26.3 GB, 430 tensors, dense bf16 — 415 BF16 + 15 F32).
# ComfyUI-native keys under the `model.diffusion_model.` DiT prefix. DiT-only (no TE/VAE/tokenizer).
# Captured by reading the 8-byte LE safetensors header length + JSON header (sc-14017 S0b).
# The 26 GB weights file itself is intentionally NOT committed; this key list is the fixture.
